lse,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1718083828,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7279710151349636133","book_info":{"abstract":"岛国排放核污水，导致海洋生物变异，末日降临！
文明覆灭前，全民开启无限流穿越求生。
只要从平行末世中活着回来，就能获得丰富奖励快速变强！
沈云绑定系统，进入异界就能签到一个超级金手指。
海岛求生，开局签到万倍暴击吃喝不愁。
丧尸末日，签到满级直升，开局十阶巅峰满级无敌！
古代乱世，签到五十万大雪龙骑，斩女帝扫天下！
网游末世，签到死亡掠夺，秒杀神兽掠夺其属性。
废土末世，签到完美修复，一块破铁修复出帝王机甲。
诡异世界，签到规则之主，我的话，就是规则！
御兽末世，签到无限进化，宠物资质低？直接升华，神都杀给你看！
公路求生，签到极致合成，两支木箭合成单兵镭射管你敢信？
【快节奏+速通】
……　
沈云：‘系统，你把总部的挂都搬来了？’
‘宿主，保驾护航无敌系统，主打一个真实专业！’
‘好好好！够变态，我喜欢！’
无敌金手指护体，沈云一路横推，极品奖励都拿到手软了。
就这样，一个让诸天万界无法理解的恐怖存在，正在形成……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3483d6751a349a60c1c90bc9884e9631","author":"挽风云","author_id":"","book_id":"7279710151349636133","book_name":"都有系统了，直接无敌不过分吧？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7279710231167730232","read_count":"64387","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1279356"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"579","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,末世,诸天万界,求生,开局,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/def8bb21665d33c81ad2cecf5facb7a9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316424&x-signature=NlGoF98Yzst0YzmZwBQW6Sqa80M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2247010464302936","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.405584e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063344D835A2B4C2A38AF955C2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":157,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8405,"reply_count":12,"show_pv":247167},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7457101127329121086","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"听书的话感觉也很好！[爱慕]
本书剧情引人入胜，加上配音更是锦上添花！期待配音团队的下一部作品！[顶帖]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736250934,"group_id":"7279710151349636133","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"866890018717821"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7279710151349636133","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12543,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7457118108149383998","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"完结撒花！[笑][顶帖]沈云的故事还在继续，期待作者的下一本书！大结局的时候以为系统没了真的让人泪目[哭]！真的很喜欢系统这个角色，无时无刻陪在沈云身边，主打一个保驾护航，最佳系统当之无愧！杀伐果断，不被美色迷惑，全程智商在线的主角，不断破解末日危机，解决诸天万界灾厄一族，与天道决战于虚空！
现实的海族异兽，穿越的各种末日世界，危机四伏的世界，人类的生死存亡，让人期待真相到底是什么？在沈云不断的探索下，埋藏在深处的秘密渐渐浮现。精彩的还远远不止这些……作者加油！","text_exts":[{"e":132,"s":128,"text":"诸天万界","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%AF%B8%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%87%E7%95%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741324248AF955C2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227457118108149383998%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227279710151349636133%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%AF%B8%E5%A4%A9%E4%B8%87%E7%95%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736250397,"group_id":"7279710151349636133","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/EGhUPEif1QkcZAXyYbowQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"866890018717821","user_name":"全职主宰者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"866890018717821","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7279710151349636133","book_info":{"abstract":"岛国排放核污水，导致海洋生物变异，末日降临！
